Off Calendar Feb-27-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joseph M. Breall, Esq. (415) 345-0545 for Defendant and Moving Party Lee
Niall Vignoles, Deputy City Attorney (415) 554-3906, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party People of the State of California
RULING:
A R G U E D; Defendant Pius Lee's Motion To Enforce The Terms Of Settlement Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is GRANTED; the settlement agreement was breached by the City and County of San Francisco. Defendant Pius Lee's Motion For Attorney Fees is GRANTED in the amount of $5,000.00. The Court will enter an order in this matter; proposed order is submitted by Attorney Breall. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT PIUS LEE'S Motion To Enforce The Terms Of Settlement Pursuant To CCP 664.6 And Attorneys Fees is CONTINUED to 02/27/04. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joseph M. Breall, Esq. of BREALL & BREALL 345-0545, for defendant Pius Lee, demurring party
Niall Vignoles, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-3906, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified -- DEFENDANT PIUS LEE's DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- sustained regarding alter ego to plead alter ego facts. 10 days leave to amend. Overruled as to c/a 1 & 3. Defendant has 10 days leave to answer or otherwise respond. Plaintiff has till March 20, 2003 to file second amend complaint. Both plaintiff's and defendant's requests for sanctions were denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/CW) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS PIUS LEE, SHU XIONG TAN, AND JUAN AN LIANG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
